passive.name: Duelist's Dance
passive.description: Fiora has revealed a Vital on this Champion. If she hits the Vital, she restores Health and gains Move Speed.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Fiora}} challenges nearby enemy champions, calling out a direction from which she will try to strike their {{as|Vitals|buzzword}}. A new {{as|Vital|buzzword}} is called out after some time or if one is struck.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Striking a vital deals {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} based on the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}}, {{tip|heals}} '''Fiora''' and grants her a burst of {{as|{{sti|movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Fiora''' identifies the {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} of nearby {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy champions, marked as an arc around them in North-, East-, South- or Westward direction. {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} take {{fd|1.75}} seconds to become targetable and linger for {{fd|13.25}} seconds afterwards while '''Fiora''' remains near the target, otherwise the {{as|Vital|buzzword}} will disappear. After a {{as|Vital|buzzword}} ends, '''Fiora''' identifies a new one on her target.
wiki_detail.description2: Dealing damage in the direction of a {{as|Vital|buzzword}} will trigger it to deal {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' true damage}}}} equal to {{as|3% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of target's '''maximum''' health}}, {{tip|heal}} '''Fiora''' for {{pp|35 to 100}}, and grant her {{pp|type=[[File:Grand Challenge.png|20px|link=]] ''Grand Challenge's'' Rank|key=%|20 to 50 for 4|0 to 3|formula=20%+(10%*Grand Challenge's Rank)|color=ms}} {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} that decays over {{fd|1.85}} seconds.
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1200|If Fiora is visible}} {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|1350|Distance for remaining 'near' the target}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|250|If Fiora is out of vision, estimated}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} can be triggered by any source of damage '''Fiora''' deals, except those with {{tip|default damage}} and {{tip|reactive damage}} types.
* The {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} are visible to all units.
* A {{as|Vital's|buzzword}} angle is fixed to the champion's model and doesn't interact with its orientation.
* {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} spawn directions alternate in a Northeast-Southwest pattern. Other than that, they have a 50% chance to spawn North or East, or South or West, respectively.
** {{pending for test}} The direction of the first Vital upon '''Fiora''' and her enemy encountering one another in the game for the first time is always South- or Westward. This is regardless of whether Fiora is in the Blue or Red team.
* {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} will not trigger if the attack is {{tip|dodge|dodged}} or missed while '''Fiora''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
** {{tip|Block}} will not prevent a trigger.
** If the {{as|Vital|buzzword}} is triggered by {{ai|Lunge|Fiora}}, it can be {{tip|dodge|dodged}}, but it can't be {{tip|block|blocked}} and will trigger even if '''Fiora''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.

Q.name: Lunge
Q.description: Fiora lunges in a direction and stabs a nearby enemy, dealing physical damage and applying on-hit effects.
Q.tooltip:
Fiora lunges in a direction and stabs the closest enemy, ward, or structure, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. The strike will prioritize Vitals and enemies it will kill.

If Fiora strikes an enemy, this Ability's Cooldown is reduced by {{ cdrefundpercent*100 }}%.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiora}} {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction and then stabs a nearby enemy, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If she stabs a target, the cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiora''' {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction, then stabs a nearby enemy. ''Lunge'' can hit [[structures]] and {{tip|ward|wards}}. Stabbing a target reduces ''Lunge's'' {{sti|cooldown}} by 50%.
wiki_detail.description2: The stab deals {{as|physical damage}} and applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Fiora''' can cast any of her [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash. The target does not have to be {{tip|sight|visible}} to be hit by this ability.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Lunge's'' dash speed is modified by her {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} at the time of cast:
** 1100 + {{as|350% '''bonus''' movement speed}}, capped at 1600 maximum dash speed if bonus movement speed is positive.
** 1100 + {{as|300% '''bonus''' movement speed}}, capped at 850 minimum dash speed if bonus movement speed is negative.
* '''Fiora''' does not stab if the {{tip|dash}} is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
** {{si|Flash}} gets sealed during the dash so '''Fiora''' cannot interrupt herself with it. This also means she cannot buffer ''Flash'' during the dash for it to be cast right afterward, however.
** '''Fiora''' can cast {{ii|Hextech Rocketbelt}} during the dash, potentially interrupting it based on the timing, preventing the stab if it does.
* The dash '''can''' pass through walls.
** The dash has no forgiveness mechanic to clear distant or wider walls with. Any wall wider than 400 units is not crossable.
* The stab searches for targets in its radius and prioritizes in order of:
** Nearest enemy champion affected by {{ai|Grand Challenge|Fiora}} with a {{as|Vital|buzzword}} facing '''Fiora'''.
** Nearest enemy champion {{as|Vital|buzzword}} facing '''Fiora'''.
** Nearest enemy champion affected by {{ai|Grand Challenge|Fiora}}
** Enemy champion with the lowest percent health out of all champions <20% remaining health.
** Nearest enemy champion, minion, or monster within 60% of the radius ({{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 252) with current health below ''Lunge's'' raw damage.
** Nearest enemy champion in the radius check.
** Nearest champion in a {{tip|er|icononly = true}} rectangular check with 160 width and 450 units length backwards from '''Fiora's''' current facting direction, ignoring the normal radius check.
*** Turning '''Fiora's''' facing direction during the dash (e.g. by casting {{ai|Riposte|Fiora}}) can create some very long range hits opposite to her new facing direction, especially against targets with a large gameplay radius.{{bug}}
** Nearest enemy minion with current health below ''Lunge's'' raw damage.
** Any nearest enemy minion or monster.
** Structures.
** Wards.
* ''Lunge'' will not attempt to strike [[jungle plants]].
* ''Lunge'' deals {{tip|basic damage}}, but also triggers spell effects by also being tagged as {{tip|spell damage}}.
** ''Lunge'' cannot {{tip|critically strike}}.
* ''Lunge'' won't deal damage, if the spell is {{tip|dodge|dodged}} or {{tip|block|blocked}}, but will deal damage if '''Fiora''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}}.
* ''Lunge'' does not apply {{tip|on-attack}} effects apart from certain exceptions.
** It does apply {{tip|Energized}} as if it was an {{tip|on-hit}} effect.
** It does not stack {{ii|Guinsoo's Rageblade}} nor trigger Phantom Hit.

W.name: Riposte
W.description: Fiora parries all incoming damage and disables for a short time, then stabs in a direction. This stab slows the first enemy champion hit, or stuns them if Fiora blocked an immobilizing effect with this ability.
W.tooltip: Fiora parries all incoming damage, disables, and negative effects for {{ parryduration }} seconds, then stabs. The stab deals {{ stabdamage }} magic damage to the first champion hit and Slows Move Speed by {{ msslowpercent*-100 }}% and Attack Speed by {{ attackslowpercent*-100 }}%  for {{ ccduration }} seconds. If Fiora parries an Immobilizing effect, the stabbed enemy is Stunned rather than Slowed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiora}} briefly parries all incoming damage, debuffs, and {{tip|cc-immune|disables}}, then stabs in a direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The stab {{tip|slow|slows}} the first enemy champion hit, or {{tip|stun|stuns}} them if '''Fiora''' parried an {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} effect.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiora''' enters a defensive stance for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, becoming {{tip|lockout|unable to act}}, preventing all incoming non-{{tip|turret}} damage, and gaining [[debuff]] immunity and {{tip|cc-immune|crowd control immunity}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Additionally, over the first {{fd|0.6}} seconds of the duration, '''Fiora''' poises to strike, after which she sends a shock with her sword in a line in the target direction, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies hit until colliding with an enemy champion.
wiki_detail.description3: The enemy champion struck is also {{tip|slow|slowed}} and {{tip|cripple|crippled}} by 25% for 2 seconds. If ''Riposte'' negates at least one {{tt|hostile|belonging to an enemy source}} {{tip|immobilize|immobilizing}} effect, '''Fiora''' {{tip|stun|stuns}} the target for the same duration instead.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Riposte'' is not {{tip|invulnerability}} but instead reduces any damage to her by 100% late into the damage event. Because of this, it interacts differently with effects triggered from damage:
** {{stil|Life steal}} and {{tip|Heal|Healing}} based on damage dealt (Vamp) will still have effect even if the damage is ultimately ignored by ''Riposte''.
** {{tip|Shield|Shields}} will absorb damage before ''Riposte'' takes effect.
** '''Fiora''' cannot be {{tip|execute|executed}} by {{cai|Death from Below|Pyke}} during ''Riposte'' but she can by {{bi|Aspect of the Dragon}}.
* ''Riposte'' will not negate allied {{tip|crowd control}}.
* ''Riposte'' will not negate {{tip|nearsight}}.
* {{tip|Immobilize|Immobilizing}} effects include those from {{ui|Blast Cone}} (only if triggered by an enemy) and {{tip|monster|epic monsters}}.
* Debuff immunity includes [[summoner spells]], such as {{si|Exhaust}} and {{si|Ignite}}, as well as [[damage over time]] and other effects.
* ''Riposte'' is and is not prioritized over certain effects:
** ''Riposte'' will block effects before {{tip|spell shield|spell shields}}.
** {{ai|Black Shield|Morgana}} will negate {{tip|crowd control}} before ''Riposte''.
*** ''Riposte'' will not be able to apply its {{tip|stun}}, as it requires ''Riposte'' to negate the {{tip|immobilize}} and not any other external source to do so.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will also prevent {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} from being triggered by ''Riposte''.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Fiora''' is performing ''Riposte'':
{{ct|move=false|attack=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false|interrupts=death}}
wiki_detail.flavorsound: {{sm2|Fiora_Original_W2_2.ogg}} (Upon blocking an immobilizing effect) "One step ahead!"

E.name: Bladework
E.description: Fiora has increased attack speed for the next two attacks. The first attack slows the target, and the second attack will critically strike.
E.tooltip: Fiora gains {{ aspercent*100 }}% Attack Speed for her next two Attacks. The first Attack Slows by {{ slowpercent*-100 }}% for {{ slowduration }} second. The second Attack always critically strikes for {{ attacktwopercenttad*100 }}% damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiora}} gains {{sti|range|'''bonus''' range}} and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for the next two attacks.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The first attack {{tip|slow|slows}} the target, and the second attack will {{tip|critically strike}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiora''' empowers her next two [[basic attack]]s {{tip|on-attack}} within 4 seconds to gain {{sti|range|25 '''bonus''' range}} and {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description2: The first attack {{tip|slow|slows}} the target by 30% for 1 second but cannot {{tip|critically strike}}. The second attack will {{tip|critically strike}} for {{sti|critical damage modifiers|{{as|'''modified''' critical damage}}}}, including to {{tip|turrets|structures}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{ii|Infinity Edge}}'s {{as|'''bonus''' critical damage}} will increase the damage of the second attack by 50% AD.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will only block the slow from the first hit.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Bladework's'' interaction with {{tip|dodge|dodging}}, {{tip|block|blocking}}, and {{tip|blind|blinding}} effects.

R.name: Grand Challenge
R.description: Fiora reveals all four Vitals on an enemy champion and gains Move Speed while near them. If Fiora hits all four Vitals or if the target dies after she has hit at least one, Fiora and her allies in the area are healed over the next few seconds.

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Fiora}} reveals all {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} on an enemy champion and gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while near them.
wiki_detail.blurb3: If '''Fiora''' triggers at least one {{as|Vital|buzzword}} before the target {{tip|death|dies}}, or triggers all four, she creates a {{ai|Grand Challenge 2|Fiora|''Victory Zone''}} which continually {{tip|heal|heals}} '''Fiora''' and her allies.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Fiora''' challenges the target enemy champion for 8 seconds, highlighting all four of their {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} after a {{fd|0.5}}-second delay. While in effect, ''{{ai|Duelist's Dance|Fiora}}'' does not identify new {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} on '''Fiora's''' target.
wiki_detail.description3: While near the target, '''Fiora''' gains ''{{ais|Duelist's Dance|Fiora}}'' {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.description4: If '''Fiora''' triggers at least one {{as|Vital|buzzword}} before the target {{tip|death|dies}}, or triggers all four, she creates a {{ai|Grand Challenge 2|Fiora|''Victory Zone''}} at their location for {{pp|changedisplay=true|type=Vitals hit|2 to 5 for 4|color=buzzword}} seconds, which {{tip|heal|heals}} '''Fiora''' and all allies within the area every second.
wiki_detail.leveling4: {{st|Heal per Tick|{{ap|75 to 125}} {{as|(+ 60% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Maximum Heal|{{ap|75*5 to 125*5}} {{as|(+ 300% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description5: ''Unlike {{ai|Duelist's Dance|Fiora}}, the {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} will continue to linger even if '''Fiora''' is not nearby.''
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|550|Movement speed radius, includes target radius}} / {{tt|500|Heal zone radius, does not include target radius}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Grand Challenge'' is dispelled instantly if targeting a [[decoy]].
** {{Pending for test}}: {{cai|Glory in Death|Sion}}
* The damage of this ability scales with {{ai|Duelist's Dance|Fiora}}.
* Even if '''Fiora''' dies, the {{ai|Grand Challenge 2|Fiora|''Victory Zone''}} will trigger so long as she hit at least one {{as|Vital|buzzword}} and they die before the {{as|Vitals|buzzword}} wear off. 
** {{tip|Resurrection}} effects will not prevent the activation of the {{ai|Grand Challenge 2|Fiora|''Victory Zone''}}.
* Ally units in {{tip|stasis (buff)|stasis}} will not be {{tip|heal|healed}} by the {{ai|Grand Challenge 2|Fiora|Victory Zone}}.
* '''Fiora''' will automatically attack the target upon casting if the target was selected while they weren't in range of the ability.
wiki_detail.tips: * If the target stays very close to terrain they can prevent '''Fiora''' from hitting all vitals.
